title: iris sibirica var. orientalis
intro: Iris sibirica var. orientalis, also known as the Asian Siberian iris, is a variant of the Siberian iris plant species that originates from China, Japan, and Korea. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be attributed to its chemical compounds such as iridoid glycosides. This plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and improving cardiovascular health. The herbal preparations of Iris sibirica var. orientalis include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are typically used to treat various health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
